sourcesContent:
export const I18N = {
  fr: {
    appName: 'PanelCut Pro',
    tagline: 'Optimiseur de découpe de panneaux',

    projectName: 'Nom du projet',

    panel: 'Panneau',

    panelWidth: 'Longueur (cm)',

    settings: 'Réglages',
    pricePerPanel: 'Prix par panneau (€)',
    totalCost: 'Coût matière estimé',
    exportPdf: 'Exporter PDF',
    share: 'Partager',
  },
  en: {
    appName: 'PanelCut Pro',
    tagline: 'Panel cut optimizer',
    newProject: 'New project',
    projectName: 'Project name',
    projectNamePlaceholder: 'E.g. Bedroom wardrobe',
    panel: 'Panel',
    panelDims: 'Panel dimensions',
    panelWidth: 'Length (cm)',
    panelHeight: 'Width (cm)',
    kerf: 'Blade kerf (mm)',
    tolerance: 'Grouping tolerance (mm)',
    pieces: 'Parts to cut',
    addPiece: '+ Add a part',
    pieceName: 'Name',
    pieceLength: 'Length (cm)',
    pieceHeight: 'Height (cm)',
    pieceQty: 'Qty',
    optimize: 'Optimize cuts',
    optimizing: 'Computing...',
    results: 'Cut plan',
    panels: 'panels',
    pieces_count: 'parts',
    utilization: 'Utilization',
    waste: 'Waste',
    panel_n: 'Panel',
    of: '/',
    cuts: 'Cut order',
    bandCut: '✂ Band cut at',
    pieceCut: 'Part',
    redeligne: '⟹ Re-rip to',
    rotated: '[rotated 90°]',
    waste_recoverable: 'Recoverable offcut',
    summary: 'Project summary',
    totalPanels: 'Panels needed',
    totalPieces: 'Total parts',
    back: '← Back',
    delete: 'Delete',
    duplicate: 'Duplicate',
    edit: 'Edit',
    save: 'Save',

    confirm_delete: 'Delete this part?',

    pricePerPanel: 'Price per panel (€)',

export function useLang() {
  const nav = navigator.language || 'fr';
  return nav.toLowerCase().startsWith('fr') ? 'fr' : 'en';
}
